name: riptide-attest-presentation
description: Builds the Riptide Attest master deck and technical documentation from source, with quality gates

scripts.gates: python qa/contrast_gate.py out/Riptide-Attest-Master-Deck.pptx && python qa/layout_gate.py out/Riptide-Attest-Master-Deck.pptx
scripts.all: npm run diagrams && npm run deck && npm run doc && npm run gates
